title: TpvRecaptureResult
description: Extension 4 additive result object. Validates extension_4_result on the run-packet. Governing law: ext4-spec-v0.1.4 §7.2, §15.3, §16, §16.6. additionalProperties: false per §7.2.

extension_4_enabled.description: True when Extension 4 was enabled in the scenario. §16.2–§16.5.

convergence_iterations.description: 0 when disabled/invalid, 1 for one-pass, ≥1 for iterative. §16.6.

nonconvergence_blocking_applied.description: Inherited from 3A blocking_on_nonconvergence. False when disabled/invalid/one-pass. §12.9, §16.6.

q_rad_baseline_w.description: Baseline radiator-emitted thermal power. ε_rad * σ * A_rad * (T_rad^4 - T_space^4). §9.2.

q_tpv_in_w.description: TPV-intercepted thermal power. Q_tpv_in = χ_int * Q_rad_baseline. §9.4.

p_elec_w.description: TPV electrical output. P_elec = η_tpv * Q_tpv_in. §9.5.

p_export_w.description: Exported electrical power. P_export = f_exp * P_elec. §9.8.

p_onboard_w.description: Onboard-used electrical power. P_onboard = (1 - f_exp) * P_elec. §9.9.

q_return_w.description: Returned onboard heat. Q_return = α_ret * P_onboard. §9.10.

q_tpv_loss_w.description: TPV local inefficiency heat. Q_tpv_loss = Q_tpv_in - P_elec. §9.7.

q_tpv_local_to_radiator_w.description: TPV loss returned to radiator burden. Q_tpv_loss when returns_to_radiator; else 0. §9.11.

q_tpv_separate_cooling_load_w.description: TPV loss booked as separate cooling load. Q_tpv_loss when separate_cooling; else 0. §9.11.

q_rad_net_w.description: Net radiator burden. Q_rad_net = Q_rad_baseline - P_export + Q_return + Q_tpv_local_to_radiator. §9.12.

q_relief_w.description: Radiator burden relief. ΔQ_relief = Q_rad_baseline - Q_rad_net. Negative means burden worsened. §9.13.

area_equivalent_bol_m2.description: Equivalent BOL area. null when 3A basis absent or Q_base_ref ≤ 0. §9.14.

area_equivalent_eol_m2.description: Equivalent EOL area. null when 3A basis absent or Q_base_ref ≤ 0. §9.14.

area_delta_bol_m2.description: BOL area delta vs 3A baseline. null when 3A basis absent or Q_base_ref ≤ 0. §9.14.

area_delta_eol_m2.description: EOL area delta vs 3A baseline. null when 3A basis absent or Q_base_ref ≤ 0. §9.14.

baseline_sink_temperature_k.description: Resolved sink temperature basis used for Q_rad_baseline. §10.2, §9.2.

baseline_radiator_temperature_k.description: Resolved radiator hot-side temperature basis. target_surface_temp_k. §10.2.

tpv_cold_side_temperature_k.description: TPV cell cold-side temperature used in carnot_bounded mode. §9.6.

iteration_history.description: Per-iteration state. Absent in minimal mode. Present only in full detail mode. Absent (not empty array) is canonical minimal form. §11.3, §16.5.

abs_delta_w.description: null on first iteration (no prior basis). §15.3.

defaults_applied.description: Names of fields where defaults were applied per §13.2.

blocking_errors.description: Blocking error codes. Non-empty when convergence_status='invalid'. §13.3, §18.3.
